description: An agent at the disability services testing center must proctor an exam for a student who has an accommodation to use a text-to-speech reader.

nodes.task_description: Verify the student's identity and the specific accommodations for this exam.

expected_outcome.value: Proctor confirms the student and the 'text-to-speech software' accommodation.

nodes.task_description: Set up the student at a computer with the approved software and the digital version of the exam.

expected_outcome.value: Proctor successfully logs the student into the testing environment.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the student during the exam to ensure compliance with academic integrity policies.

expected_outcome.value: Proctor observes the student without incident.
